ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the track */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length of the track (e.g., 3:55) */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of track version (e.g., Studio, Remix, Edit) */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the track (e.g., remix details) */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the release the track is part of */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer who worked on the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who performed the track */,
  "bpm" INTEGER /* Beats per minute of the track */,
  "key_signature" TEXT /* Key signature of the track */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the track contains explicit content */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "lyricist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lyricist who wrote the lyrics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the track was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the track was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "release_title" TEXT /* Title of the release */,
  "release_type" TEXT /* Type of the release (e.g., Album, Single, EP) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the release was made available */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the release (e.g., CD, Digital, Vinyl) */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the label that released the music */,
  "catalog_number" TEXT /* Catalog number of the release */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code for the release */,
  "upc" TEXT /* Universal Product Code for the release */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the release */,
  "is_physical" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the release is physical */,
  "is_digital" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the release is digital */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the release was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the release was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Primary genre of the artist */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the artist record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the artist record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty or expertise of the producer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the producer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the producer */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the producer's social media profiles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the producer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the producer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the label */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the label */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the label's website */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the label was founded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the label record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the label record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original track */,
  "version_title" TEXT /* Title of the version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of the version (e.g., Studio, Remix, Edit) */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "remixer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the remixer who created the version */,
  "bpm" INTEGER /* Beats per minute of the version */,
  "key_signature" TEXT /* Key signature of the version */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the version contains explicit content */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the version */,
  "lyricist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lyricist who wrote the lyrics for the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_versions_remixer_id FOREIGN KEY ("remixer_id") REFERENCES remixers ("remixer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_versions_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "remixers" (
  "remixer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each remixer */,
  "remixer_name" TEXT /* Name of the remixer */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty or expertise of the remixer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the remixer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the remixer */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the remixer's social media profiles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the remixer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the remixer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("remixer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the release (e.g., CD, Digital, Vinyl) */,
  "distribution_method" TEXT /* Method of distribution (e.g., Streaming, Physical) */,
  "catalog_number" TEXT /* Catalog number of the track release */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code for the track release */,
  "upc" TEXT /* Universal Product Code for the track release */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the track release */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the track release was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the track release was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id", "version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_play_history" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play event */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track version */,
  "play_date" TEXT /* Date the track was played */,
  "play_source" TEXT /* Source of the play (e.g., Spotify, Apple Music) */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track was played */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the play event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the play event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_play_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES track_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_download_history" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track version */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date the track was downloaded */,
  "download_source" TEXT /* Source of the download (e.g., iTunes, Bandcamp) */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track was downloaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the downloaded file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the download event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_download_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES track_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_stream_history" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stream event */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track version */,
  "stream_date" TEXT /* Date the track was streamed */,
  "stream_platform" TEXT /* Platform where the track was streamed (e.g., Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube) */,
  "stream_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track was streamed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the stream event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the stream event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_stream_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES track_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., artist, producer, label executive, distribution partner) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
